reviews.author: Sathya
reviews.review_body: The school provides a supportive environment with dedicated teachers and a well rounded curriculum. I am very happy to see overall development of my daughter. Thank you

reviews.author: Srividhya
reviews.review_body: First Good environment for kids to explore their Skills and Always Energetic Faculty Farternities And Non  Teaching staffs too, Correspondent mam very friendly Nature, School Punctuality 💯, Extra curricular activities 💯, always they welcomes with Happy smiling faces, Overall I m super happy ,, communication skill 💯✅👍, questions paper are out of Box was gud for thinking

reviews.author: Keerthana Karthikeyan
reviews.review_body: The school was really good and excellent. The school timing was very comfortable and easy going. The staffs are very friendly and caring every kids in a good way. The teaching methodology is very excellent and the kids are trying to speak in English with fluency and staffs are making every kid to participate in everything. Recently the sports day was very good and trained every students very well. Overall the school is excellent 👌👍

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: Try to give more sports facilities

reviews.author: Kannan
reviews.review_body: Overall good experiences and good teaching skills ,

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: Good,gives a more important to personal  development

reviews.author: Soundarya
reviews.review_body: Overall the school is good. I also would like to bring to the notice of school management that many parents including grandparents of school students who commute regularly to drop and pick up the students through g square adjacent road which is not in a very good condition poses danger of skidding as I myself couldn’t drive two wheelers in that damaged road. It would of immense help if school management understands the concern and take action with the help of local municipal authorities as there are many students coming from kannampalayam, Pappampatti, peedampalli are using the same way as their regular path like four times in a day.thank you for understanding.

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body:
We are happy with the teachers for the clarity in the teaching. They are friendly and approachable towards students.
The Sports Day was organised well and it was equal to an experienced school's event. The events were quick and the students and teachers put in lots of effort. The events started at the informed time and ended within the mentioned time as the teachers worked with coordination. They motivated and encouraged kindergarten students to keep going and complete the game.
Overall, we are very happy that our children are going to this school.

reviews.author: Deepika Jayakumar
reviews.review_body: Every child is unique in their character, talent, interests, etc.. The educators in Bridgewoods gives individual attention towards the children, supports their curiosity, groom their knowledge towards their passion. In such a way Bridgewoods is standing unique in parents heart and children minds.

reviews.author: Nithya Prabhu
reviews.review_body:
The first best school which is excellent in infrastructure, equipments, new methodology of teaching...Each and every Educator plays a major role.They never fails in fulfilling our expectations in education as well discipline..
Right place for the perfect education....
